tree.name: Luka Doncic
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Lakers acquired Doncic, Kleber, Markieff Morris from Mavericks; sent AD, Max Christie, 2029 1st to Dallas; sent Hood-Schifino and 2025 2nd (LAC own) to Utah

assetsGivenUp.name: Anthony Davis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Lakers acquired Davis from Pelicans for Lonzo Ball, Brandon Ingram, Josh Hart, De'Andre Hunter (#4 pick), 2022 1st, 2023 1st (swap), 2025 1st
assetsGivenUp.note: Traded from Lakers to Dallas Mavericks

assetsGivenUp.name: Lonzo Ball
assetsGivenUp.note: UCLA point guard, drafted 2nd overall by Lakers

assetsGivenUp.name: Brandon Ingram
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke forward, drafted 2nd overall by Lakers

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Hart
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #30 by UTA, immediately traded to LAL on draft night. Pick originally from GSW via 3-team trade (Jul 10, 2013).

assetsGivenUp.name: Thomas Bryant
assetsGivenUp.note: Also received from UTA in Hart/Bradley draft-night swap; drafted #42 by UTA

assetsGivenUp.name: Tony Bradley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Pick (#28) acquired from Rockets in Lou Williams trade (Feb 23, 2017); LAL drafted Bradley and traded him to UTA for Josh Hart (#30)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU traded this pick with Corey Brewer to LAL for Lou Williams

assetsGivenUp.name: Lou Williams
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA Jul 2015; traded to HOU for Corey Brewer and 2017 1st (#28)

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Jazz traded Josh Hart (#30) and Thomas Bryant to Lakers for Tony Bradley

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#4) via LAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' own 1st round pick, became #4 overall, sent to NOP then traded to ATL

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick (#8) via LAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' own 1st round pick, sent to NOP

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#9) via LAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' own 1st round pick, NOP deferred from 2024 to 2025

assetsGivenUp.name: Max Christie
assetsGivenUp.note: Michigan State guard, drafted 35th overall by Lakers

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick via LAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' own 1st round pick, sent to Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: Jalen Hood-Schifino
assetsGivenUp.note: Indiana guard, drafted 17th overall by Lakers, sent to Utah Jazz

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#45)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: Lakers sent Beverley to Magic, Bryant to Nuggets; received Reed, Bamba, 2024 2nd and 2025 2nd from Clippers
assetsGivenUp.note: LAC own 2nd round pick, sent to Utah Jazz in Doncic trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers acquired Beverley from Jazz for Talen Horton-Tucker and Stanley Johnson
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Orlando Magic in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Talen Horton-Tucker
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #46 by ORL, immediately traded to LAL on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 2nd Round Pick (#58)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own pick; sent to ORL in THT trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations ($2.2M)
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to ORL

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Lakers traded cash ($2.2M) and a 2020 2nd round pick (#58, Paul Reed) to Magic for the #46 pick (Talen Horton-Tucker)

assetsGivenUp.name: Stanley Johnson
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed by Lakers after multiple 10-day contracts in 2021-22 season

assetsGivenUp.name: Thomas Bryant
assetsGivenUp.note: Center signed with Lakers as free agent, sent to Denver Nuggets in 4-team trade
